confidentiality_commitments.no_unauthorised_copy_or_release: I agree that I will: • keep all information about the Services confidential, including any information I receive or create while providing the Services or executing the Contract • only use any information as it relates to the Contract • not remove, photocopy or otherwise reproduce any documents Council has given me access to • not release or make public any information without Council’s written consent, unless the Contract allows otherwise.

capability_summary.licences_and_qualifications: Licences and qualifications are listed in Schedule 5 of the Returnable Schedules (CTX 5) and Table WHS051.11 Contractor Scope of Works & Requirements (CTX 6).
capability_summary.organisation_and_key_staff: Carrier Australia Business Operating System (BOS) is centrally managed and controlled as well as internally and externally audited for compliance.
capability_summary.quality_management_plan: The company has established a documented quality management system, process and procedures that are designed to comply to the requirements of the ISO 9001:2015 standards.
capability_summary.inspection_and_testing_plan: simulating peak operating conditions. • Integration testing with BMCS, ensuring seamless automation and fault detection capabilities. • Coordination with Council representatives for operational handover, including an in-depth training session for maintenance personnel. • Submission of testing and commissioning reports, including thermal imaging analysis and performance validation.
capability_summary.methodology_and_procedures: Provide the following information with the Tender: Manufacturer’s rated performance data for the Chiller offered, Full dimensional details in the form of certified drawings, Weights, including loading diagrams, Details of facilities and services required for the Chiller offered, Details of accessories and features provided with the Chiller offered, Electrical requirements for the Chiller offered, Wiring Diagrams, Evidence of conformance with AS1677.2 and AS1210 ; The following shall be provided with the Chiller or as part of the pipework modifications to connect the new Chiller into the CHW piping reticulation ; Programming of the work and subsequent site management of the work ; submit to Council a detailed schedule showing the proposed sequence of work and the durations for which the various areas will need to be available to the Contractor for the work to be completed ; Supply and install 7.5kW ABB ACH580 VSD’s to respective circulating pumps for the heat recovery coils ; All other associated and necessary electrical works not specifically mentioned above complying to current and applicable electrical codes and safe operation of the systems ; Remove and re-instate plantroom external wall louvre for access to equipment delivery and retrieval of redundant equipment ; Remove any job generated rubbish and dispose off-site, including redundant equipment ; Co-ordinate with centre management and Council officer in charge of the project, including allowing safe access to centre’s miscellaneous stocks they need for centre’s operation and safe movement of the pool staffs through the work area ; All other associated works, including controls, builder’s, electrical, hydraulics and other associated works not specifically mentioned in this scope of works to form a complete and operating system ; Test and commission the system ; New interconnecting CHW and COW pipework between AHU 1 & 3 and the new Chillers ; Associated electrical and interconnecting controls work ; Modify and reconfigure the existing electrical system to accommodate the chillers and other associated equipment ; Associated plumbing/hydraulics works ; Associated builder’s work, making good, removal of redundant items and construction rubbish, etc ; All other works not mentioned above to form a complete and operating system similar to the newly refurbished AHU 2

reporting_under_modern_slavery_act.preparation_activities: Carrier Australia has considered the extent to which it may contribute to, cause or be linked to modern slavery risks in its operations and supply chains.

policies_related_to_human_rights_and_eth.details: Carrier Global has a Human Rights Policy based on American law to ensure modern slavery obligations fit consistently across all areas of international operations, including Australia.

internal_ms_risk_management.details: Carrier Australia assesses the risk of modern slavery as low both within its own operations and its supply of goods from entities controlled by Carrier Global or Carrier Australia.

supply_chain_ms_risk_management.details: Carrier Australia has considered the extent to which it may contribute to, cause or be linked to modern slavery risks in its operations and supply chains. Actions to date [CTX 3] ... As stated above, Carrier Australia assesses the risk of modern slavery as low both within its own operations and its supply of goods from entities controlled by Carrier Global or Carrier Australia. As to the provision of good and services sourced from within Australia from non-Carrier Australia businesses, Carrier Australi present a low risk of modern slavery. [CTX 4]
